response.justification: Bogdan is a highly skilled Staff Software Engineer with extensive hands-on experience in backend development, distributed systems, and microservices. However, this role requires an executive-level CTO with a proven track record of scaling engineering organizations from 10 to 30+ people and operating complex multi-agent AI systems in regulated environments. His resume reflects a strong individual contributor background but lacks the necessary executive leadership, team scaling experience, and deep production AI/Fintech expertise required for this position.
strengths: Deep expertise in backend architecture, distributed systems, and microservices.
Strong advocate for engineering quality, practicing TDD, CI/CD, and software craftsmanship.
Extensive hands-on experience across a wide variety of technologies and open-source projects.
concerns: No evidence of executive leadership or experience scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ engineers.
Lacks production experience building and operating complex, stateful multi-agent AI systems in high-stakes environments.
Missing deep domain expertise in algorithmic fintech infrastructure and regulatory compliance.
